data.author: esteve
data.message:
C-style comments are not syntactically correct in JSON (#98)

* C-style comments are not syntactically correct in JSON

The JSON grammar does not accept C (/* */) or C++ (//) comments.

See:
- http://www.json.org/
- http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc7159.txt
- https://stackoverflow.com/a/4183018

* Use a dummy field to store the comment
